  "findings": [
    "Reverse-lapped weather-resistant barrier (WRB) with the upper layer tucked behind the lower layer."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop WRB installation immediately.",
    "Reinstall the upper WRB layer over the lower WRB layer to establish a proper shingle-lap shedding plane.",
    "Inspect and correct any integrated flashing details affected by the reverse lap."
  ],
  "rationale": "A reverse-lapped WRB violates basic water shedding principles by directing water behind the lower barrier layer rather than shedding it to the exterior. This sequence and installation defect must be corrected before any exterior cladding or further flashing work can proceed.",
  "references": [
    "IRC R703.1.1",
    "IRC R703.2",
    "Manufacturer installation instructions"
  ]
}
